title: L2.5 Typed State Definition
description: Standard schema for all cognitive state objects in the Probabilistic State Machine. Ensures lifecycle and lineage tracking.

state_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific state generation (e.g., state_regime_20260307_01)

state_type.description: The category of the cognitive variable.

value.description: The actual value or probability distribution of the state.

as_of.description: The exact time this state was computed.

effective_from.description: The time from which this state becomes actionable.

decay_half_life.description: Time period (e.g., '24h', '7d') after which the confidence score degrades by 50%.

confidence.description: The calibration score or certainty level of this state (0.0 to 1.0).

derived_from_evidence_ids.description: Pointers to L2.3 Evidence Graph nodes that justified this state calculation.

model_version.description: The iteration of the prompt/algorithm used to calculate this state.

supersedes.description: The state_id of the previous state object that this one replaces.

invalidates.description: A list of other state_types that are logically forced into re-evaluation because of this update (e.g., Regime updates invalidate P_30d).
